room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=classroom_01 profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create exactly 12 student desks and exactly 12 corresponding student chairs. Orient them toward a strong front teaching wall/whiteboard with clear aisles. Include a teacher desk and teacher chair, storage cabinet, bookshelf or cubbies, bulletin board/educational posters, classroom clock, trash bin, at least one plant, and visible exterior daylight/windows. Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks, folders/worksheets, pencil/marker holders, erasers/rulers, glue/scissors, water bottles, backpacks, storage bins and paper trays without clutter. Use a balanced moderate-density row or cluster layout. Include one functional teacher filing cabinet with operable drawers as an articulated furniture role.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Reference west-wing lower classroom with balanced teaching rows.

critical_issues: Missing/insufficient visual evidence for required small items: glue sticks (views 1-3), scissors (views 1-3), rulers (views 1-3), and a whiteboard eraser (views 1-3).
Fail-closed on contract checklist: several required inventory items cannot be confirmed from the provided generated views.
observations: View 1 shows a 12-desk/12-chair layout oriented toward the front teaching wall with clear aisles and door clearance.
View 3 shows the front teaching area with teacher desk/chair, a wall whiteboard, a bulletin/display board, a clock, a trash bin, and a multi-drawer cabinet consistent with a filing cabinet.

View 2 confirms cubby/bookshelf storage, a visible backpack in a cubby, and some school supplies, but several required small items (glue sticks, scissors, rulers, whiteboard eraser) are not clearly identifiable in any view.
repair_instructions: Place clearly identifiable glue sticks and scissors in the classroom (e.g., in a supply caddy on the teacher desk or on a student desk) and ensure they are visible in at least one review view.
Add a clearly identifiable ruler and a whiteboard eraser on/near the whiteboard tray and ensure they are visible in a review view.

articulated_teacher_filing_cabinet.label: Teacher filing cabinet with visibly operable drawer fronts is present.
articulated_teacher_filing_cabinet.observation: A tall multi-drawer cabinet stands to the left of the teacher desk, consistent with a teacher filing cabinet, but drawer operability is only implied by drawer fronts/handles.

clear_circulation.label: Door clearance, aisles, and humanoid/robot circulation are visibly usable.
clear_circulation.observation: Student desk rows leave wide aisles and the right-side door opens into unobstructed floor space.

collision_free_support.label: Objects are supported, correctly scaled, and visibly free of collisions/floating.
collision_free_support.observation: Objects appear grounded/supported on desks/shelves with no obvious floating or major interpenetration visible.

daylight_and_warm_lighting.label: Natural daylight and warm interior lighting are visible.
daylight_and_warm_lighting.observation: Windows are visible on the right wall and ceiling light fixtures are visible, indicating daylight plus warm interior lighting intent.
